# Siltuximab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Siltuximab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Siltuximab</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Siltuximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Sylvant is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with multicentric Castleman’s disease (MCD who are human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) negative and human herpesvirus-8 (HHV-8) negative.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Kimura disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>extracutaneous mastocytoma（99.6%）</li>
<li>hepatic infarction（99.4%）</li>
<li>hepatic veno-occlusive disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>Castleman disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>peliosis hepatis（99.3%）</li>
<li>Kaposi's sarcoma (disease)（99.3%）</li>
<li>autosomal recessive familial Mediterranean fever（99.2%）</li>
<li>aggressive systemic mastocytosis（99.2%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial periodic fever（99.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with combined immunodeficiency（98.8%）</li>
<li>TAFRO syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（98.8%）</li>
<li>lymphangiomyoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（98.7%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（98.6%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.6%）</li>
<li>hepatic veno-occlusive disease-immunodeficiency syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>pancytopenia due to IKZF1 mutations（98.4%）</li>
<li>periodic fever-infantile enterocolitis-autoinflammatory syndrome（98.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/siltuximab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
